features.title: REST + GraphQL
features.description: Dual API surface for every use case. Use REST endpoints for simple integrations with predictable URLs and HTTP semantics. Switch to GraphQL for complex, nested queries where you need precise control over response shape and depth.

features.title: Interactive Playground
features.description: Test every endpoint directly in your browser — no client setup required. The HeadyAPI playground provides pre-filled example requests, response inspection, and the ability to execute live API calls against your own key.

features.title: Key Management
features.description: Create, name, scope, rotate, and revoke API keys with granular permission controls. Assign keys to specific services, IP ranges, or rate tiers. Full key audit log with request history and anomaly detection.

features.title: φ-Scaled Rate Limiting
features.description: Rate limits are calculated using the golden ratio (φ = 1.618...) to produce tiered thresholds that scale naturally with usage patterns. Burst allowances, rolling windows, and per-key overrides provide maximum flexibility.

features.title: Webhook Events
features.description: Subscribe to real-time webhook events from any Heady™ service — agent completions, pipeline status changes, memory updates, and billing thresholds. HMAC-signed payloads, configurable retry logic, and event replay.

features.title: SDK Libraries (JS/Python/Go)
features.description: Official SDK clients for JavaScript/TypeScript (npm: @heady/sdk), Python (pip: heady-sdk), and Go (planned). Full TypeScript typings, async/await support, automatic retry, and streaming response helpers built in.

features.title: OpenAPI Spec
features.description: Complete OpenAPI 3.1 specification available for download, Postman import, or SDK generation. Every endpoint, parameter, response schema, and error type is documented with examples and machine-readable definitions.

features.title: Real-Time WebSocket
features.description: Connect via WebSocket for low-latency, bidirectional streaming with the Heady™ platform. Subscribe to agent output streams, receive live memory updates, and push events without polling overhead.
